rule: Every subject row resolves source and run
All nonblank UUID fields match canonical GUID
Active yarn scope product count
failure_output: Any mismatch without owner-approved scope change

rule: Variant count
Image-link count and FK
Official name and HEX/RGB remain raw
Each nonzero variant_file_id joins exactly to RAW_VARIANT_FILES.file_id and remains attached to the same variant image link
pass_criterion: No image substituted from another variant

rule: No Base64/binary field exists in target
SHA-256 before/after load is stable and HTML remains exact
Receipt minus Expense through cutoff
Compute stock_total per product+variant as SUM(quantity_available) across all scoped warehouses; compare with independent aggregation manifest total
required_input_fields: product_id, variant_id, warehouse_id, quantity_available, cutoff_at_utc, input_checksum_sha256
pass_criterion: 0 mismatches; zero totals retained in validation output

rule: Selected Period is maximum <= cutoff per key
Barcode and all codes remain text
Derived color fields never replace Description/НаименованиеПолное
URLs contain no credentials/tokens added by ETL
expected/extracted/validated/rejected/missing reconcile
pass_criterion: extracted = validated + rejected; missing separately explained

rule: Dictionary and mapping checksum match delivered contract
Every declared non-null internal FK resolves to the target PK; conditional FKs ignore only documented source zero GUID
required_input_fields: Data Dictionary foreign_key definitions; all loaded PK/FK columns
pass_criterion: 0 unresolved mandatory FK; optional misses counted
failure_output: Emit source sheet, field, masked key and target

rule: No loaded subject row is orphaned from its mandatory parent
failure_output: Emit relation name and orphan count

rule: Canonical source key is unique before technical key generation
required_input_fields: source_entityset, source_record_id or documented composite source key
failure_output: Emit EntitySet, composite key and duplicate count

rule: Every physical sheet/header is declared and no removed or unknown field exists
failure_output: Emit missing, extra and reordered headers

rule: Variants without a photo remain present and are reported; no substitute photo is assigned
pass_criterion: All 9,114 variants retained; no-photo count reported
failure_output: Emit variants without photo and any substitution attempt
rollback_effect: Do not reject product/variant rows; reject substituted media

rule: Full variant×warehouse matrix retains explicit zero quantities at the cutoff
pass_criterion: 72,912 current rows at 9,114×8 scope unless owner-approved scope changes; zero rows retained
failure_output: Emit missing combinations and altered zeros

rule: Listings, content and images use the same deterministic platform-qualified listing_id while preserving source IDs
required_input_fields: platform, source_listing_id, listing_id; child source_listing_id_raw, listing_id
failure_output: Emit platform, masked source ID and child sheet

rule: product_id is derived only when owner_type_raw is the exact nomenclature catalog type and owner_raw is a canonical GUID
binary_storage_id and file link are validated by the exact pair file_id+file_type_raw
failure_output: Emit masked file ID and observed type

rule: Observed Упаковка_Key values are preserved raw and their actual catalog role is confirmed before any FK is declared
pass_criterion: All distinct nonzero keys classified by exact published type; unresolved count reported
failure_output: Emit distinct masked key and source field
rollback_effect: Do not fabricate FK; Phase owner decides readiness

rule: Every recommendation preserves target_product_source_id; target_product_in_scope_id is populated only for members of RAW_PRODUCTS
pass_criterion: 0 lost source targets; in-scope membership exact
failure_output: Emit lost or wrongly typed target
rollback_effect: Reject affected derived in-scope FK; preserve source relation

rule: Every contract-required source field published nullable by OData is profiled on the scoped first load before enforcement
required_input_fields: Data Dictionary nullable=NO fields; scoped extracted values; OData nullable metadata
pass_criterion: 0 unexplained nulls; each reject/default policy documented without fabricating source values
failure_output: Emit sheet, field and null count
rollback_effect: Do not approve full load until null policy is accepted
